title: Pulling from private registry without authentication needs a better error message
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

When pulling from a private repo without appropriate authentication, the error is not helpful, it just says "Failed"

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1.  podman pull docker://quay.io/{myprivaterepo}/alpine:latest

**Describe the results you received:**
```
# podman pull docker://quay.io/{myprivaterepo}/testing:third 
Trying to pull docker://quay.io/{myprivaterepo}/testing:third...Failed
(0x1840f00,0xc000486e60)
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

A message along the lines of what Docker supplies:

```
Error response from daemon: unauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
# podman version
Version:            1.1.2
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.5
Git Commit:         a95a49d3038462d033f84ac314ec8a3064a99cff
Built:              Tue Mar  5 13:10:31 2019
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

      runc version 1.0.0-rc6+dev

comments.body: (I think we might have a good error and be eating it)

Me thinks you're correct @mheon, here's the last line of debug:

```
Error pulling image ref //quay.io/{myprivaterepo}/testing:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://quay.io/{myprivaterepo}/testing:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/{myprivaterepo}//testing: unauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized 
Failed
```
Going to close as a duplicate.
